title: Monday Doc Database or Tab
excerpt:

posts.author: DMarken (Danny)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, we’re finding ourselves losing track of Monday Docs or having a hard time moving a Monday Doc from being in the navigation to being in an item file column or vise versa.

It would be much easier to manage Monday Docs if we had a tab that served as a database in the navigation under My Work or somewhere close.

It would allow us to quickly manage and keep track of all our docs, who’s making what, what to delete, when were they last updated, etc.

posts.author: matthias_blinno (Matthias Tanno)
posts.cookedHtml:
Danny:

in the navigation under My Work or somewhere close.

Or at least implement the docs in the file view. Because right now, it’s difficult to manage the monday workdocs.

posts.author: jpellegrino89 (Joe)
posts.cookedHtml: I 100% agree with this. It should act like Confluence or a KB where all of your documents are and you can organize everythnig better that way. Not everyone wants to create a board with rows and attach documents to make it look like a knowledge base, its tedious.
